name: arize-trace
description: Downloads, exports, and inspects existing Arize traces and spans to understand what an LLM app is doing or debug runtime issues.
intent_triggers: use the arize trace agent skill
run a workflow for arize trace

幫我啟用 arize trace 這個 skill
用 agent skill 完成 arize trace
